title: gastrochilus pumilus
intro: Gastrochilus pumilus, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a small, terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gastrochilus pumilus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Gastrochilus pumilus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
